Patient Details | Cancer Target Dates | Hospital Number: 9990037
NHS Number: 9990000037
Name: Eljay Fraser
Gender: Male
DOB: 06/10/1947    Age: 79 Years | 62 DAY TARGET: 15/08/2024

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date. | Staging & Diagnosis(g) | Diagnosis: Right‑sided colonic tumour
ICD10 Code: C18.0
Differentiation: Poorly differentiated | Staging:  
Integrated TNM Stage: 
Dukes: | Clinical Details(f): | Intermittent episodes of anaemia symptoms and weight loss affecting daily activities for 10 weeks. Additional symptoms include back pain. Past medical history significant for type 2 diabetes.

Imaging:

Colonoscopy: multiple polyps, is there a history of a polyposis syndrome? Suspicious cancers in the transverse and ascending colons. 

CT TAP: 
Transverse colon: T3 N1 EMVI negative, 
Ascending colon: T4b, N1c, EMVI negative. Directly infiltrates the terminal ileum 
Indeterminate lung nodules, can be kept under review, below the size criteria for PET-CT, M0 | MDT Outcome(h) | For chemotherapy, surgical margin is unsafe || Colorectal Multidisciplinary Meeting 24/09/2024(i)
